set.name: 2025-26 Topps NBA Hoops Basketball
set.brandNote: First Topps-branded NBA Hoops release. The brand originated with SkyBox International (1989-90), passed through Fleer/SkyBox and Upper Deck to Panini before returning under Topps' NBA licence.

subsets.name: Finals Pursuit
subsets._note: Each card belongs to exactly one version tier; no parallels. Odds appear in perInsert.finals-pursuit.versionTiers in the odds file.

subsets.name: Hoops 1989 Signatures
subsets._note: 1989-90 SkyBox design callback. Includes both modern stars and the original 1989-90 Hoops class. Card IDs use 89S- prefix.

subsets.name: Hoops Rookie Duals
subsets._note: Two rookies per card. Player and team fields are /-separated. 25 cards total.

subsets.name: Hoops Rookie Triples
subsets._note: Three rookies per card. Player and team fields are /-separated. 10 cards total.

cards.player: Cooper Flagg / Dylan Harper / Ace Bailey
cards.team: Washington Wizards / San Antonio Spurs / Charlotte Hornets

cards.player: VJ Edgecombe / Tre Johnson / Carter Bryant
cards.team: Detroit Pistons / New Orleans Pelicans / Utah Jazz

cards.team: Sacramento Kings / Dallas Mavericks / Memphis Grizzlies

cards.team: Chicago Bulls / Portland Trail Blazers / Washington Wizards

subsets.name: Hoops Rookie Veteran Duals
subsets._note: One 2025 rookie + one all-time legend. Player and team fields are /-separated. 5 cards total.
